summary: Onboarding Documents feature testing complete. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend OnboardingDocuments component displays properly for F0 partners with drag & drop upload, progress bar, and document status badges.
passed_tests: GET /api/partners/{partner_id}/onboarding-documents - Returns documents list with completion status ✅
DELETE /api/partners/{partner_id}/onboarding-documents/{document_type} - Blocks deletion of verified docs (400) ✅
GET /api/admin/onboarding-documents/pending - Returns pending documents for admin ✅
Partner F0 exists and is in correct phase ✅
Frontend: Partner F0 sees 'Documenti Onboarding' in sidebar with URGENTE badge ✅
Frontend: OnboardingDocuments component shows 3 document types ✅
Frontend: Upload areas with drag & drop functionality visible ✅
Frontend: Progress bar shows completion percentage (67%) ✅
Frontend: Document status badges (Verificato, Caricato, Obbligatorio) display correctly ✅
seed_data_creation: Test documents uploaded for partner d248c632-869d-4a13-b94a-dbf2425fa143 (Test F0 Partner)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Onboarding documents feature fully tested. Partner F0 (testf0@evolutionpro.it / Test2026!) has test documents uploaded. Admin can view pending documents via /api/admin/onboarding-documents/pending endpoint. The PartnerDocumentsView in admin sidebar is for positioning/script/course documents, not onboarding documents - a dedicated admin UI for onboarding document review may be needed.
